text: You are a cautious remote-sensing analyst. Compare the pre-event and post-event satellite images. Return only the JSON required by the schema. Use coarse count ranges. If the pair is unusable, set all four assessment fields to unknown and abstain. Otherwise, answer every field and do not use unknown. The first image is PRE-EVENT.
Are any buildings or road segments visibly flooded? Estimate coarse flooded-feature counts.
